title: PU MET 2026 Exam Schedule (Out) @ met.puchd.ac.in Panjab University

detail.title: PU MET 2026 Exam Schedule (Out) @ met.puchd.ac.in Panjab University
detail.short_info: Panjab University has released the PU MET 2026. Students can access their Panjab University Result 2025 using their registration number through the direct link here.

sections.heading: PU MET 2026 Exam Schedule (Out) @ met.puchd.ac.in Panjab University

content.text: Panjab University officials have released Panjab University Exam Time Table 2025. Furthermore, the Panjab University Time Table 2025 for PU MET 2026 was announced April 12, 2026 by the administration.

Panjab University Exam Schedule 2025 may be found by clicking on the link at the bottom of the page. All candidates should keep in mind that as Panjab University Sem Exam Time Table 2025 is released, we will update the links.

sections.heading: Important Details PU MET 2026 Exam Schedule

rows: Last date to submit application fee

sections.heading: How to Download the PU MET 2026 Exam Schedule 2025?

content.text: Candidates follow the steps to download Panjab University Time Table 2025, candidates check the details and download it easily.

items: The examination Schedules page will pop up
Time Table for different courses will show up for Regular and Regular / External.
